title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Testbook Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Testbook Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Testbook Capital India family as a Instructional Designer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Testbook Capital India:
Testbook Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Testbook Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
